  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery used by org.springframework.cloud.client
    Class
    Description
    DiscoveryClient
    Represents read operations commonly available to discovery services such as Netflix Eureka or consul.io.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery used by org.springframework.cloud.client.discovery
    Class
    Description
    EnableDiscoveryClient
    Annotation to enable a DiscoveryClient implementation.
    ManagementServerPortUtils.ManagementServerPort
    Enumeration for management server ports.
